info.title: Invexis Inventory Service API
info.description: Draft OpenAPI documentation for the Inventory service (endpoints under /v1/*). Schemas are inferred from routes and typical payloads; verify against controllers for exact field names and required properties.

200.description: Products not bought for a long time

get.summary: Get stock history for a product
Get level-3 categories for a company (paginated)
Get dashboard configuration for a company (protected)
Get all products for a company
List shops in a company with inventory stats
Get top sellers for a shop
